strengths: 17+ years of full-stack experience across web, mobile, embedded, and cloud — far exceeds the 6-year minimum
Current AI agent and MCP infrastructure work at re:cinq directly satisfies the 'AI agent development' requirement
Strong overlap with primary stack: TypeScript, Node.js, React, AWS CDK, MongoDB, Docker, Kubernetes all confirmed
concerns: Nest.js and Vitest — both central to the primary stack — are absent from the resume entirely
Kotlin and Python are not mentioned, leaving gaps in secondary stack and the multi-language proficiency requirement
Heavy personal investment in D language ecosystem (custom test runner, assertion library, web server) signals divided ecosystem focus
response.justification: Bogdan is a strong candidate whose core stack alignment (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS, Docker/K8s) and direct AI-agent/MCP work at re:cinq hit two of the most differentiating requirements. The missing Nest.js, Vitest, Kotlin, and Python are real gaps but are learnable for an engineer with this breadth and tenure; the D-language detour in personal projects is notable but does not undermine the commercial full-stack record. Worth interviewing.
